text.title: commands Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for commands as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Commands share the main agent's context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Heavy !-bash output inflates context fast. Keep bash invocations short and filtered.

failure-mode.description: No built-in state persistence between invocations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each /cmd is a fresh call. Use files for state if needed.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model sees raw $ARGUMENTS, no parsing or validation. Do not assume structure.

failure-mode.description: allowed-tools: Bash(git:*) uses prefix matching; typo in prefix silently grants no permission.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Test permission behavior carefully. Test actual invocation before deploying.

failure-mode.description: SlashCommand to Skill tool rename (Jan 2026): permissions referencing SlashCommand must be updated to Skill.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Update settings files and hooks accordingly.

failure-mode.description: Model field selects model for command's primary turn but subagent calls within use their own model.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Do not assume all nested calls use the command's specified model.

failure-mode.description: Commands invoked by an agent run in agent's context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: !-bash output is injected verbatim; keep it short to avoid context bloat.

failure-mode.description: If command writes files, it bypasses agent's permission system unless Write is in allowed-tools.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agent-generated arguments may contain newlines or quotes that break shell interpolation in !-bash blocks.

failure-mode.description: Auto-delegation: Claude selects commands based on description field.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague descriptions cause wrong command invocation. Test descriptions by asking: would I use this if I saw this description?

failure-mode.description: Avoid allowed-tools: Bash without prefix in shared commands.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Grants unrestricted shell access to any agent using the command. Dangerous.
